claim_text: Although LPIPS and other DFDs \cite{ding2020image, cong2022image, cheon2021perceptual, lao2022attentions, conde2022conformer, keshari2022multi} outperform commonly used IQ metrics in terms of correlation with human perceptual judgments in large-scale computer vision studies \cite{gu2022ntire}, these studies evaluate DFDs on natural images belonging to the same domain as the images used for encoder training.
